input.headline: ‘I never looked back’: Why readers chose a life abroad after Brexit

raw.headline: ‘I never looked back’: Why readers chose a life abroad after Brexit

winner: I never looked back — I just kept walking until I found a country that still had a "remain" button.

candidates.text: I told my friend I moved to Spain after Brexit because I love paella and sangria. He said, "That's great! But why did you look *forward*?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the headline's phrase 'never looked back,' specific reference to Spain and its culture, concise and natural humor."}

candidates.text: I decided to move to France after Brexit because I wanted to see what life was like on the other side of the border, but I’m finding it much harder to look back now that I can’t afford the cheese.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the 'look back' phrase, specific reference to Brexit and France, and a humorous take on the cost of living."}

candidates.text: After moving abroad to escape Brexit, I took the headline "I never looked back" so literally that I now have to live in a house with no rear windows and a permanent facial twitch from straining my neck.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific twist on the headline with a humorous physical consequence"}

candidates.text: I never looked back — I just kept walking until I found a country that still had a "remain" button.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on 'remain' button, concise and specific to Brexit context"}
{"score": 8.5, "reason": "Playful wordplay on 'looked back' with a twist of 'looked forward,' concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: I considered moving abroad after Brexit, but I decided against it—turns out, looking back is more fun than looking forward.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and plays on the headline's phrase with a twist, showing good surprise and specificity. However, it's slightly generic in its setup and could be more concise."}

candidates.text: After moving abroad to escape Brexit, I realized that while I never looked back, I certainly didn't want to see what was behind me.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses the headline's phrase effectively, and adds a twist with the 'didn't want to see what was behind me' line, creating both surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the Brit leave for Europe after Brexit? To finally "break free" from their passport!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant to the headline and uses a play on words with 'break free' and 'Brexit,' but it's a bit generic and lacks the specificity or surprise needed for maximum humor."}

candidates.text: After Brexit, he packed his bags and moved to France — now he’s finally done with all that "looking back" business, and also with the whole "speaking English" thing.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'looking back' and 'speaking English' add surprise and specificity, aligning well with the headline's theme."}
